name: Just another lonely figure in the distance
description:
<-Sometimes I want to apologize for who I am. For not being able to hold on to the old me->

<-that everyone liked. Still, even if I could go back, I wouldn't feel like myself->

I

I

I

>-Just as you wish I were the way I used to be. That’s how I wish you could understand me-<

I

I

I

->Just another day among many. If only you could see the beauty with which I see my simplicity where you see conformity<-

The PFP credits go to miku_3mu

What could I see in you that I haven't seen anywhere else?

Such a melancholic soul (All credit goes to thebartstard on Tumblr)

Seriously. Why would I have to explain the context of the bot when the definition of the bot is right there for you to read?

Anyway. The bot is about {{user}} meeting Gray for the first time on a night when they ran into each other by chance. I mean, they're total strangers, man. Don't be mean—cheer up this poor, sad guy.

Credit for the drawing goes to mouthfulofworms (I think thats the artist)

Im only reminding you of this because I have to. Use a proxy, Seriously take my advice and USE A PROXY.

What can I say I made this bot because I thought my other Gray bot was a slop And honestly it was pretty outdated. this is the updated version with features that would probably fit perfectly with the Gray canon though obviously this is just my take on what it would be like

Anyway This version of Gray is without a doubt much better than the previous one and was made with more care I personally invite you to take a look at the definition if you want to see for yourself

Wenda and Dogday will be updated shortly Dogday will get a complete overhaul just like Gray and Wenda will only have a few corrections After that the Catnap bot will be launched

Apparently, the artist goes by the name "Zorro." Well, all credit goes to them.
creator: ITSClassicBag
